case_title: CAROL MAURO VS. THE BROADMOOR ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAURO, CAROL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE  BROADMOOR (NOT A CORPORATION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MAURO, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT THE  BROADMOOR (NOT A CORPORATION) LIEBERMAN, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 - SERVED SEP-16-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIEBERMAN, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE BROADMOOR WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL LIEBERMAN--PRESIDENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAURO, CAROL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE  BROADMOOR (NOT A CORPORATION) LIEBERMAN, MICHAEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO PRESERVE EXHIBITS PLAINTIFF ALSO AUTHORIZES SHARON PITTMAN TO PICK UP EXHIBITS IF NECESSARY AS TO DEFENDANT THE  BROADMOOR (NOT A CORPORATION) LIEBERMAN, MICHAEL
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MAURO, CAROL (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SHARON PITTMAN)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED SEP-16-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE  BROADMOOR (NOT A CORPORATION)
